snapshot.active_constraints: C++17 standard, Ninja/LLVM pipeline, PowerShell syntax lock.
snapshot.key_knowledge: Verified standard CMakeLists.txt and minimal src/main.cpp build. Build toolchain: clang-cl, lld-link, ninja. Output: "Orchestrator Test Successful".
snapshot.artifact_trail: - CMakeLists.txt: OrchestratorTest project - src/main.cpp: entry point - build/: Ninja build artifacts - executor_report.json: status report - executor_console.log: transcript
